calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-07-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randolph Stein for Jonie Kelley.

No appearance was made by any other interested Parties. The Court denied the petition for letters of Administration.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2011 Continued To Sep-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randolph Stin for Joanie Kelley. Robert Posey (Friend of Denise Hall) present.

The Court received a letter from Ms. Hall's Physician indicating that Ms. Hall is medically unable to attend. The matter was continued to September 7, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
